title: best herbal teas for arthritis
description: Rheum palmatum tea contains bioactive constituents such as emodin, rhein, and anthraquinones, which have potent anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties that help to alleviate arthritis symptoms. The tea's anti-inflammatory properties can help to reduce joint pain and swelling, while its analgesic properties can help to relieve pain and discomfort associated with arthritis.
